author: mark
text: bl-4e7d filed for plugin-controlled commit policy on negotiation outcome. SPEC needs a CommitPolicy section: variants (Commit/Batch/Suppress), safety bounds (Suppress disallowed for required participants, batch coalesces only within one event dispatch), and the audit-attribution rule (plugin-supplied message wrapped with 'plugin: {name}: ' prefix). Either fold into SPEC scope when claimed, or treat bl-4e7d as the source of truth and have the SPEC reference it.

author: sable
text:
spec: lifecycle-sync participant model

docs/SPEC-lifecycle-sync-participants.md is the normative reference
for bl-b7fb. Specifies the Participant contract, the negotiation
primitive, field projections, failure policy (required/best-effort/
gating), CommitPolicy variants from bl-4e7d, the bl-2148 config
inheritance chain, the legacy-shim rules that preserve byte-identical
plugin behavior on upgrade, and the migration ordering across the
ten implementation children.

Format and tone follow SPEC-orphan-branch-state.md.
